title: Login successfully and reach Home
description: Verifies a returning shopper can log in with valid credentials and is routed to the Home screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username or email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the home screen

title: Create an order from checkout and see it listed in Orders
description: User can submit shipping details at checkout to create an order and then see the new order in the orders list.

steps.description: Navigate to /checkout
Fill a valid shipping address into the address field
Fill a valid phone number into the phone field
Submit the checkout form
Navigate to /orders
Verify at least one order is displayed in the orders list

title: Update cart item quantity, remove item, and reach checkout
description: User can adjust quantities, remove an item from the cart, and proceed to the checkout screen successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /cart
Increase the quantity for a cart item
Decrease the quantity for the same cart item
Remove a cart item from the cart
Proceed to checkout
Verify the user lands on the checkout screen

title: Upload payment proof from order detail and see status transition to VERIFYING
description: User can upload payment proof on an unpaid order and sees a submission confirmation with updated status in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /order-detail
Upload an image as payment proof
Verify a payment proof submission confirmation is visible
Verify the order status is shown as VERIFYING

title: Orders list shows status badges and can open an order detail
description: User can view the orders list with status badges and open an order to see its details.

steps.description: Navigate to /orders
Open the first order in the list
Verify order details are displayed

title: Register a new account and return to login
description: Verifies a first-time shopper can register with valid details and is routed back to the login screen afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill a new unique username into the username field
Fill a new unique email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify the user lands on the login screen

title: View favorites grid and open a product detail from favorites
description: User can view their favorites grid and open a product detail screen from a favorite item.

steps.description: Navigate to /favorites
Open a product from the favorites grid
Verify the product detail view is displayed

title: Remove an item from favorites from the favorites list
description: User can remove a product from favorites from the favorites screen and the item is no longer shown in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /favorites
Toggle favorite on a listed favorite item to remove it
Verify the favorites list reflects the item removal

title: Block checkout submission when required shipping fields are missing
description: User cannot submit checkout without required shipping details and sees a form validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /checkout
Fill a valid shipping address into the address field
Fill an empty value into the phone field
Submit the checkout form
Verify a required-field validation error is visible

title: Return from order detail to orders list
description: User can navigate back from an order detail view to the orders list successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /order-detail
Return to the orders list
Verify orders are displayed in the orders list

title: Navigate from login to register and back to login
description: Verifies a shopper can navigate between login and registration screens using in-app navigation links.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Click the link to go to the registration screen
Verify the user lands on the registration screen
Click the link to return to the login screen
Verify the user lands on the login screen

title: Show validation errors when submitting empty login form
description: Verifies the login form blocks submission when required fields are empty and shows validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Submit the login form
Verify required-field validation errors are visible
